title: Shortsighted stock market can no longer brush off war: 'It's too hard to ignore $100 oil'
summary_full: After staying flat as the U.S.-Iran war heated up again, equities tumbled on Thursday after oil prices crossed $100 per barrel.
summary_public: After staying flat as the U.S.-Iran war heated up again, equities tumbled on Thursday after oil prices crossed $100 per barrel.
